title: MEALS - 211info
text: MEN'S MISSION MEALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides meals three times per day. 777 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 973010431 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older and men age 18 and older with minor children who are homeless Hours: 7 days per week 6:30am-7am, noon-12:30pm, 5:30pm-6pm Email (503) 362-3983 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 362-3983 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of Commercial and Center Streets. Accessible via Salem Mass Transit Bus 1. Enter through the large double doors at the courtyard on the south side of the building. Services: Community Meals * Homeless Families Community Meals * Homeless Men Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - DAY ROOM HOUSING/SHELTER - MEN SHELTER MATERIAL GOODS - SHOWER FACILITIES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - FOOT CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEN'S MISSION
